CustomField.description: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Credit Note", IF (AND(ATOF__I_Opportunity__r.ATOF__O_Booking_to_Departure__c <= 70, ATOF__I_Opportunity__r.ATOF__O_Outstanding__c > 0), IF(ISBLANK( ATOF__CI_Client_Group__r.Id ), ATOF__I_Opportunity__r.Amount, ATOF__CI_Client_Group__r.ATOF__CG_Selling_Price__c) , IF(ISBLANK( ATOF__CI_Client_Group__r.Id ), ATOF__I_Opportunity__r.ATOF__O_Deposit_Required__c , ATOF__I_Total_Price_CG__c ) ), 0)
CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Credit Note", IF (AND(sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Booking_to_Departure__c <= 70, sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Outstanding__c > 0), IF(ISBLANK( sugati__CI_Client_Group__r.Id ), sugati__I_Opportunity__r.Amount, sugati__CI_Client_Group__r.sugati__CG_Selling_Price__c) , IF(ISBLANK( sugati__CI_Client_Group__r.Id ), sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Deposit_Required1__c , sugati__I_Total_Price_CG__c ) ), 0)
CustomField.label: Amount to be Paid
